install: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq nginx docker.io 2>/dev/null || sudo apt-get install -y -qq nginx

terminals.name: datagent-landing
terminals.command: chmod +x scripts/test-env.sh && LANDING_TEST_MODE=host scripts/test-env.sh start && echo 'Test landing: http://localhost:8080' && tail -f /tmp/datagent-nginx-error.log
